## Goal

Complete the core ScrollTrigger requirements so multiple sections respond to scroll in a controlled, readable way.

## Definition of Done

- [ ] 8+ ScrollTrigger instances
- [ ] 5+ trigger-and-play reveals
- [ ] 2+ scrubbed interactions

## Files / Links

- Likely files:
  - `index.html`
  - `styles/`
  - `scripts/main.js`
- Preview URL:
- Motion Map:
- Related issue(s):

## Constraints

- Link the Motion Map and include the relevant ScrollTrigger notes in this issue.
- Keep motion readable and aligned with the story.
- Use reduced-motion fallbacks where needed.
- Remove `markers: true` before closing the issue.

## References

- [GSAP Scroll](https://gsap.com/scroll/)
- [ScrollTrigger Docs](https://gsap.com/docs/v3/Plugins/ScrollTrigger/)

## Verification

- [ ] Scroll-triggered moments work in the browser
- [ ] Scrubbed interactions feel readable and intentional
- [ ] Console checked for blocking errors
- [ ] Production build does not leave `markers: true` on screen
- [ ] Evidence added below

## Agent Handoff

Work this issue in my repo. Follow the Goal, Definition of Done, Files / Links, Constraints, and Verification sections. Do not change files outside the listed scope without approval. When done, report what changed, how you verified it, and any open risks before I close the issue.

## Evidence

- [ ] Commit(s) linked
- [ ] Screenshot/clip showing markers while tuning
